API docs by Redocly

EKCC Auth Microservice API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Introduction

EKCC Auth Microservice API

Welcome to the EKCC Auth Microservice API documentation. This API provides secure authentication and user management for the EKCC platform.

What is EKCC?

EKCC is a platform designed to connect farmers, agents, and financial institutions to streamline credit and banking services for agricultural communities across India.

Base URL

https://ekcc.nabard.org/

Overview

This microservice handles:

  • Farmer registration, KYC and Aadhar verification
  • Agent and associate agent onboarding
  • User login, logout and JWT token management
  • Role and permission management
  • Consent management for data sharing
  • Bank account linking for farmers and agents
  • EPACS member management

Authentication

Most endpoints require a valid JWT Bearer token in the request header:

Authorization: Bearer <your_jwt_token>

Obtain your token by calling the login endpoint under register-login-controller.

Request Format

All API requests must include these headers:

Content-Type: application/json

Accept-Language: en

Support

For API access or integration support, contact the EKCC platform team.

user-controller

Operations related to user management on the EKCC platform.

updateUserStatus

Activates or deactivates a user account by their unique user ID. Pass active=true to activate and active=false to deactivate the account.

query Parameters
userId
required
integer <int64#>

Unique ID of the user whose status needs to be updated

active
required
boolean

Set true to activate the user, false to deactivate

header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

Language preference for the response. Default is English

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/user/update_status

Update Farmer Status

Updates the farmer verification status for a specific user. Used to mark a user as a verified farmer or revoke farmer status.

query Parameters
userId
required
integer <int64>

Unique ID of the user whose farmer status needs to be updated

status
required
boolean

Set true to grant farmer status, false to revoke it

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/user/farmer_status

updateUserPermission

header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en
Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
integer <int64>
Array of objects (UserRolePayload)

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/user/update_user_permission

Content type
application/json

      • "permissionName": "string",
      • "moduleName": "string",
      • "permissionDisplayName": "string",
      • "applicationModuleId": 0,
      • "permissionId": 0,
      • "active": true
      }
    ]
}

saveUserPermission

This endpoint allows for the creation or update of a user's permissions. It accepts a JSON payload with the user's details and their associated permissions.

header Parameters

string
Default: en
Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
integer <int64>
permissionIds
Array of integers <int64> [ items <int64 > ]

createUserForBank

This endpoint allows you to add a new user to the system. The entityLevelId parameter specifies the level of the entity the user belongs to.

path Parameters
entityLevelId
required
integer <int64>
query Parameters
isAdmin
boolean
isForce
boolean
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

required
id
integer <int64>
userName
string [ 1 .. 254 ] characters ^(?>[a-zA-Z0-9!$&*+#=?^_`{|}~().-]+@[a-zA-Z0-...
password
string [ 4 .. 60 ] characters

string [ 0 .. 50 ] characters
lastName
string [ 0 .. 50 ] characters
email
string [ 5 .. 254 ] characters

boolean

integer <int64>
incorrectPWDAttempts

designation

epacs-member-controller

EPACS member management operations for cooperative societies.

verifyMember

Verifies an ePACS code and returns a response indicating whether the code is valid or not.

query Parameters
memberNo
required
string
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/epacs/verify

epacsAadharVerification

The /api/auth/epacs/verification endpoint is used to verify an EPACS (Electronic Performance Appraisal and Certification System) code. This POST endpoint requires authentication and validates the provided EPACS code.

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/epacs/verification

uploadEPacsMastersData

Uploads an electronic payment authorization code (ePACS) file to the server.

query Parameters
file
required
string <binary>

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/epacs/upload

bpp-controller

BPP (Business Process Partner) related operations on EKCC.

onSelect

The /api/auth/beckn/on_select endpoint is a POST method that receives a user's selection during the Beckn protocol flow. It is used to authenticate and authorize the user's selection.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
property name*
additional property
object

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/beckn/on_select

Request samples

Content type
application/json
{
  • "property1": { },
  • "property2": { }
}

required
property name*
additional property

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/beckn/encrypt_rbih_credentials

encryptEkccCredentials

path Parameters
bankMasterId
required
integer <int64>

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/beckn/encrypt_ekcc_credentials/{bankMasterId}

encryptAllEkccCredentials

Encrypts and returns all EKCC (Encrypted Key-Credential Combination) credentials.

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/beckn/encrypt_all_ekcc_credentials

encrypt

The /api/auth/beckn/encrypt endpoint is used to securely encrypt data for the Beckn protocol. This endpoint accepts a POST request and returns the encrypted data.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
property name*
additional property
string

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/beckn/encrypt

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "property1": "string",
  • "property2": "string"
}

decrypt

Request Body schema: application/json
required
property name*
additional property
string

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/beckn/decrypt

application/json

This API endpoint is responsible for encrypting and decrypting Aadhar card values. It accepts POST requests and provides a secure way to handle sensitive Aadhar card information.

query Parameters
value
required
string
header Parameters
Accept-Language
string
Default: en

Responses

EKCC Auth Service

https://ekcc.nabard.org/api/auth/aadhar/encrpt/decrpt/values
